steps.title: Write $f$ in factored form
steps.content: Since the graph passes through $(8,0)$ and $(-3,0)$, those are the roots, so $f(x)=a(x-8)(x+3)$ for some integer $a\gt 1$.

steps.title: Test each choice for an integer $a\gt 1$
steps.content:
Solve $-4a=\text{choice}$ for each:
  • $6$: $a=-\tfrac{3}{2}$, not an integer $\gt 1$.
  • $5$: $a=-\tfrac{5}{4}$, not an integer $\gt 1$.
  • $-4$: $a=1$, not greater than $1$.
  • $-8$: $a=2$, an integer greater than $1$.
D is correct.
